taxon.author: O. Pickard-Cambridge,
taxon.distribution: Macaronesia, Mediterranean to Egypt, India, Central Asia, China, Japan. Introduced to Canada, USA, Panama, Galapagos, Poland, St. Helena, Mauritius, Society Is.

referenceObject.reference: Pickard-Cambridge, O. (1876b). Catalogue of a collection of spiders made in Egypt, with descriptions of new species and characters of a new genus. Proceedings of the Zoological Society of London 44(3): 541-630, pl. 58-60. doi: 10.1111/j.1096-3642.1876.tb02595.x
